subcodes.first_line: I know not how long this consuming fire of separation and severance shall endure, nor when the gates of nearness and reunion shall open [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندانم که این آتش هجر و فراق آخر تا بکی در سوز و گداز است و ابواب قرب و وصل تا
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment
